race.description: Mercure Sunshine Coast Kawana Waters Hcp (C2)
race.comment: JAM PACKED (5) proved too strong last start and scored by 1.2 lengths over 1600m at this track. Has a decent record here with two wins and two minor placings from seven starts. Michael Rodd who has two wins when partnering stays on and is likely to feature in the outcome. RED CODE (7) has had two runs back from a spell and went down fighting last start over the same trip to this last start at this circuit. Down in the weights and rates among the leading chances. ZOUSLAYER (11) was beaten a head into second at this track two starts ago then appeared at Ipswich last time and finished 2.75 lengths from the winner in fifth. Can feature on best. KOZAK PRINCE (4) has been out of the money since scoring when resuming. Fitter and can atone.
